compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect recipe integration into planning and sprint
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect recipe integration into /dso:implementation-plan and /dso:sprint.
**Why**: Future agents need to know that recipe: task types exist, how pre-flight works, and how fallback behaves.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md (architecture section, agent routing table), .claude/design-notes.md
- OUT: New documentation files, recipe catalog docs (Epic A scope)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the recipe: task type, pre-flight check, cleanup phase, and fallback behavior
  ← Satisfies: project documentation accuracy
- When this story is complete, design-notes reflect integration design decisions
  ← Satisfies: architectural decision record

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude
